title: Privacy Policy
draft_warning: Draft: this privacy policy has not yet been legally reviewed and may change before bookings are accepted.

blocks.text: This draft explains the type of information Party.LAN may need to handle enquiries and hosted party planning.

items: Room photos or rough dimensions shared by the Customer.

blocks.text: Information is used to respond to enquiries, plan suitable setups and communicate about Party.LAN services.
Trusted service providers may be used where needed for website hosting, communication or operational support.
Retention periods are draft placeholders and will be confirmed in the final Privacy Policy.
Customer rights information should be reviewed and completed before this page is treated as final.
Use the contact route on the homepage for privacy questions.
